data.title: Gate.io Launches KERNEL Spot and Contract Trading
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Gate.io will launch KERNEL spot trading at 20:00 (UTC+8) on April 14, and simultaneously open KERNEL perpetual contract real trading (USDT settlement), supporting 1-50 times leverage.

data.title: Bitget responds to campus ambassador controversy: always stick to the bottom line and will launch the "Green Campus Plan"
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget Chinese head Xie Jiayin released a clarification and explanation about the campus ambassador program on social media, saying, "In response to BlockBeats' call for major trading platforms to stop promoting contract experience money to college students, Bitget made the following explanation: 
1. About the campus ambassador program: Bitget's campus ambassador program aims to promote blockchain knowledge and provide internship opportunities, and does not encourage contract trading or issue contract experience money. The program was launched on February 18. Because users misunderstood that it was related to contract rebates, Bitget was quickly offline worldwide on the morning of February 19, and all applications during the period were rejected. 
2. Adhere to principles and refuse to induce: Bitget has never distributed contract experience money to students in any form. This is Bitget's bottom line. Social supervision is welcome. If such behavior is found, screenshots can be reported. Bitget will deal with it seriously and give effective reporters up to 1,000 USDT rewards. 
3. University cooperation is limited to popular science and employment: Bitget's cooperation with universities focuses on Web3 popular science, internships and employment guidance, such as 2025 Campus recruitment (28 people have been hired), Zhejiang University hackathon, HKUST Web3 sharing session, etc.
Bitget has always supported industry self-discipline and actively responded to the BlockBeats initiative. On this basis, Bitget will launch the "Green Campus Plan" to help college students understand Web3 and explore the future in a healthier way. Everyone is welcome to supervise and make suggestions. ”

data.title: OM Token's 90% Crash Leaves Holders Reeling —MANTRA Blames 'Reckless Liquidations,' CEO Says 'Fixing This'
data.description:
The native cryptocurrency of a real-world asset-focused project dramatically crashed by nearly 90% on Sunday, wiping out billions of dollars worth of investors' fortunes. 
source: https://www.benzinga.com/25/04/44781876/om-tokens-90-crash-leaves-holders-reeling-with-lossesmantra-blames-reckless-liquidations-but-are-big-players-involved?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.description:

source: https://coincu.com/331996-angle-protocol-frontend-vulnerability

data.title: Binance will support Filecoin (FIL) network upgrade
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance is expected to suspend the token recharge and withdrawal services of the Filecoin (FIL) network at 18:00 (Eastern Time Zone 8) on April 14, 2025 to support its network upgrade.
The project will upgrade the network at block height 4,878,840 (estimated at 19:00 Eastern Time Zone 8 on April 14, 2025).

data.title: The top five FARTCOIN addresses have a profit of more than $8.9 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Nansen monitoring, the top five FARTCOIN addresses have realized a total profit of more than $8.9 million, one of which has made a profit of $1.88 million and has been liquidated. Another address still holds unrealized gains worth $4.15 million.

data.title: U.S. Secretary of Commerce: China and the United States have had initial contact on tariff issues through intermediaries
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Phoenix TV, U.S. Commerce Secretary Lutnick said in an interview with ABC that the United States and China have had "preliminary contacts" on tariffs through intermediaries. At the same time, he pointed out that the U.S. government is studying and formulating special tariff measures for key electronic products such as semiconductors.

data.title: Binance responds to OM flash crash: mainly caused by cross-trading platform liquidation, will closely monitor developments
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Binance officially announced that it has noticed that the MANTRA token OM has experienced drastic price fluctuations. Preliminary investigations have found that the fluctuations in the past day were mainly caused by cross-trading platform liquidations.
Since October last year, Binance has implemented a number of risk control measures for OM tokens, including reducing leverage levels. Binance will continue to monitor leverage levels and adjust them according to market conditions to strengthen risk control and help reduce volatility.
Since January this year, Binance has also enabled pop-up prompts for OM on the spot trading page, reminding users that the token economic model of the token has changed significantly and the supply has increased.
Binance will continue to pay close attention to developments and take appropriate actions to protect user interests and maintain the stability and fairness of the platform.

data.title: U.S. and China Engage in Preliminary Tariff Discussions
data.description: According to Foresight News, U.S. Commerce Secretary Lutnick revealed in an interview with ABC that the United States and China have initiated preliminary discussions on tariff issues through intermediaries. He also mentioned that the U.S. government is considering special tariff measures targeting key electronic products, including semiconductors.
